center.name: 蒂拉蘭區
center.summary: 蒂拉蘭區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-and-yellow phainoptila，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: parkeri of the black-and-yellow phainoptila is found in the Tilarán and Guanacaste cordilleras in northern Costa Rica

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: parkeri of the black-and-yellow phainoptila is found in the Tilarán and Guanacaste cordilleras in northern Costa Rica
